adapter_contract.advises_on: Missing or unstable source_ref fields; lost provider-native ids/timestamps/URLs/excerpts/evidence pointers; output that bypasses the Observation -> AdapterEmission normalization; schema/SARIF fields that cannot be independently reviewed; connector behavior that starts owning canonical state.
adapter_contract.description: Advisory mod that flags evidence-shape and contract-preservation risks in connector/adapter output.
adapter_contract.name: Adapter Contract
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Annotates contract-preservation risk; may suggest review questions, never repairs a record.

authority_boundary.advises_on: Changes that may cross Bicameral's authority, trust-tier, or canonical-state boundaries.
authority_boundary.description: Advisory mod that flags changes that may cross Bicameral's authority, trust-tier, or canonical-state boundaries.
authority_boundary.name: Authority Boundary
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Flags authority/trust-tier/canonical-state boundary risk; suggests review, never enforces.

code_review_risk.advises_on: PR-level review risk — the first mod family behind the Bicameral Review Bot (ADR-0011).
code_review_risk.description: Advisory mod that flags pR-level review risk — the first mod family behind the Bicameral Review Bot (ADR-0011).
code_review_risk.name: Code Review Risk
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces PR review-risk signals; advises a reviewer, never blocks CI.

connector_freshness.advises_on: Stale provider assumptions in connector docs, fixtures, auth notes, references, and parser scope.
connector_freshness.description: Advisory mod that flags stale provider assumptions in connector docs, fixtures, auth notes, references, and parser scope.
connector_freshness.name: Connector Freshness
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Flags possibly-stale connector assumptions; suggests a refresh, never edits.

data_classification.advises_on: Classifying sensitive evidence before it is routed, reviewed, or proposed for outbound notification.
data_classification.description: Advisory mod that flags classifying sensitive evidence before it is routed, reviewed, or proposed for outbound notification.
data_classification.name: Data Classification
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a sensitivity classification; never gates or redacts canonical state.

decision_drift.advises_on: New source evidence that appears to conflict with recorded decisions, ADRs, trust tiers, or governance docs.
decision_drift.description: Advisory mod that flags new source evidence that appears to conflict with recorded decisions, ADRs, trust tiers, or governance docs.
decision_drift.name: Decision Drift
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces possible drift from recorded decisions; suggests review, never overwrites a record.

dependency_risk.advises_on: Dependency-risk signals from connector evidence — known vulnerabilities and dependency-manifest changes.
dependency_risk.description: Advisory mod that flags dependency-risk signals from connector evidence — known vulnerabilities and dependency-manifest changes.
dependency_risk.name: Dependency Risk
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Annotates dependency-risk signals; routes to a reviewer, never blocks or approves.

noisy_source_gate.advises_on: High-volume, low-signal channels (Slack chat, Granola/Fathom meeting transcripts) flooding the candidate store; recommends a manual gate unless the source's trust tier is operator-raised. A non-noisy source yields nothing.
noisy_source_gate.description: Advisory mod that recommends manual review-gating for high-noise evidence sources unless the operator has raised the source's trust.

config.description: Source ids the operator has explicitly trusted, so the mod does NOT recommend a manual gate for them. The default high-noise set (slack/granola/fathom) is config-as-code in the mod.
config.label: Sources with operator-raised trust (skip the gate)

noisy_source_gate.name: Noisy Source Gate
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.
Optional: an operator source-trust map to suppress the gate for raised sources.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a manual gate for noisy sources; it suggests, never enforces.

ownership_routing.advises_on: Reviewer lenses and domain ownership suggested from changed paths, source evidence, and recorded ownership hints.
ownership_routing.description: Advisory mod that flags reviewer lenses and domain ownership suggested from changed paths, source evidence, and recorded ownership hints.
ownership_routing.name: Ownership Routing
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests reviewer lenses / domain owners; a hint, never an assignment.

security_mentions.advises_on: Whole-word security keywords (auth/token/secret/credential/oauth/webhook/cve/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
security_mentions.description: Advisory mod that flags whole-word security keywords (auth/token/secret/credential/oauth/webhook/cve/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
security_mentions.name: Security Mentions
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces security-keyword mentions; a routing signal, never a finding-of-record.

source_trust_calibration.advises_on: Calibrating source trust based on provenance, source type, historical noise, data sensitivity, and operation tier.
source_trust_calibration.description: Advisory mod that flags calibrating source trust based on provenance, source type, historical noise, data sensitivity, and operation tier.
source_trust_calibration.name: Source Trust Calibration
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a source-trust calibration; advisory input to the operator, never an enforced tier.

test_adequacy.advises_on: Missing or weak tests around changed behavior, connector parsing, fixtures, governance gates, and review workflows.
test_adequacy.description: Advisory mod that flags missing or weak tests around changed behavior, connector parsing, fixtures, governance gates, and review workflows.
test_adequacy.name: Test Adequacy
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Flags weak/missing test coverage; suggests review questions, never blocks CI.

webhook_risk.advises_on: Webhook safety signals across signature verification, replay protection, event schema handling, idempotency, and outbound side effects.
webhook_risk.description: Advisory mod that flags webhook safety signals across signature verification, replay protection, event schema handling, idempotency, and outbound side effects.
webhook_risk.name: Webhook Risk
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces webhook-safety signals; an advisory, never a gate.
